header: Everything you need to ship, in one plan

items.title: Unlimited projects and seats
items.description_text: Invite your whole team and spin up as many projects as you need at no extra cost.

items.title: SOC 2 Type II security
items.description_text: Data encrypted in transit and at rest, with SSO, audit logs, and role-based access.

items.title: 99.9% uptime, backed by SLA
items.description_text: Redundant infrastructure across three regions keeps your workspace online around the clock.

items.title: Support that replies in minutes
items.description_text: Reach a real engineer by chat or email, with a median first response under 10 minutes.

items.title: Open API and 80+ integrations
items.description_text: Connect Slack, GitHub, Jira, and Zapier, or build your own workflow on our REST API.
